item.title: What is Seaborn primarily built on?

material.mattext: What is Seaborn primarily built on?

item.title: Seaborn is designed mainly for statistical data visualization.

material.mattext: Seaborn is designed mainly for statistical data visualization.
What is the default Seaborn style usually set to?
Which Seaborn plot is commonly used to visualize a correlation matrix?
True or False: pairplot displays pairwise relationships between variables.
Which Seaborn plot is best for showing counts of categorical values?

item.title: Fill in the blank: sns import

material.mattext: Fill in the blank: Seaborn is commonly imported as ______.
A scatterplot is useful for examining the relationship between two numeric variables.
Which plot is commonly used to show the distribution of a single variable?
FacetGrid is used to create multiple subplots based on categorical values.
Which function is a figure-level interface for relational plots?
A boxplot summarizes a distribution using quartiles and outliers.
Which Seaborn plot is commonly used to compare distributions across categories?

item.title: Fill in the blank: color parameter

material.mattext: Fill in the blank: The parameter used to specify a single color in many Seaborn plots is ______.
True or False: lmplot can display a regression line with scatter points.
Which function is used to set Seaborn aesthetic themes?
A KDE plot estimates the probability density of a variable.
Which Seaborn function is used to visualize the relationship between two variables along with their distributions?
Fill in the blank: The ______ parameter is commonly used to set a color palette in Seaborn.
True or False: barplot typically shows an aggregate statistic such as the mean for each category.
Which function is a low-level regression plotting function in Seaborn?
Clustermap is used for hierarchical clustering visualizations.
Which function is a figure-level categorical plotting interface in Seaborn?
Fill in the blank: The ______ argument in many Seaborn functions specifies the dataset.
True or False: swarmplot displays all data points while avoiding overlap.
Which plot shows a distribution and its density shape for a category?
Fill in the blank: The ______ parameter is used to map a variable to color categories.
True or False: A heatmap uses color intensity to represent values in a matrix or table.
Which function is commonly used for a scatter plot in Seaborn?
Fill in the blank: The function ______ is used to set the style of a Seaborn plot.
True or False: lineplot is often used to visualize trends over time.
Which function creates pairwise plots for all numeric variables in a dataset?
Fill in the blank: A plot usually contains two ______ that define the x- and y-directions.
True or False: despine can remove the top and right spines from a plot.
catplot can combine different categorical plot types in a figure-level interface.
Fill in the blank: The ______ parameter is typically used to specify the variable on the x-axis.
Fill in the blank: The ______ parameter is typically used to specify the variable on the y-axis.
Which plot often displays a central tendency line for categories?
Fill in the blank: The ______ parameter can be used to change the size of points in some Seaborn plots.

item.title: True false: countplot for numeric data

material.mattext: True or False: countplot is mainly used for numeric distributions.
Match the Seaborn plot to its best use.
What type of variables does pairplot typically include by default?
Fill in the blank: The ______ parameter can control transparency in many plots.
True or False: clustermap can reorder rows and columns based on similarity.
Which parameters usually assign axis labels or data variables in Seaborn?
Fill in the blank: A ______ is often used to show values in a matrix with colors.
True or False: Seaborn integrates well with Pandas DataFrames.
Fill in the blank: The ______ helps explain the meaning of colors or markers in a plot.
Which Seaborn feature is used to control overall look and context, such as font scaling?
Fill in the blank: Seaborn uses a ______-based design to create multi-plot layouts.
